content.headline: How Leading Teams Use Social Proof
content.body:
Marketing managers know that credibility matters. That's why we built our platform on proven principles:

[CLM_047] demonstrates how persona-aware content outperforms generic templates by addressing specific objections and outcomes.

[CLM_037] shows how persona-aware messaging outperforms generic templates in B2B contexts.

Our clients see 3x higher engagement rates by leveraging these evidence-based approaches.
